description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a prominent front porch supported by white columns and a stone foundation. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding, and the roof is primarily a dark gable style with multiple intersecting sections. The house features a wraparound porch with railings, several symmetrically arranged windows, and a main entryway accessed by a set of stone steps. A driveway leads to the side of the house, where two cars are parked, and a small landscaped area with a tree is visible. The rear and side elevations show additional windows and a secondary entrance with steps. The interior layout is partially visible, revealing multiple rooms and open spaces.
description: A two-story light-sided house with a dark gable roof, wraparound porch, stone foundation, and symmetrical windows. Features a front porch with columns, a driveway, and landscaped entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main porch with columns, stone steps, driveway, two parked cars, and a person near the entry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wraparound porch, multiple windows, and the extension of the house structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional windows, and the driveway leading to the side.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the porch, driveway, cars, and landscaped area with a tree and people near the entrance.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with stone steps, covered porch, white columns, and decorative railing
